ARO-ALK7- Obesity ARO-ALK7 is designed to silence adipocyte expression of the ACVR1C gene to reduce the production of Activin receptor-like kinase 7 (ALK7), which acts as a receptor in a pathway that regulates energy homeostasis in adipose tissue.
ARO-INHBE - Obesity ARO-INHBE is designed to reduce the hepatic expression of the INHBE gene and its secreted gene product, Activin E.
